name: Creole Okra and Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and sauté until soft.
3. Add bell pepper, okra, and tomatoes; season with salt and black pepper to taste.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. (Optional) Add fresh corn kernels if desired. Serve as a vegetable medley.
